creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #3)

Yes, WRKDIRPREFIX must provide ample space nowadays. Because it needs to be so large anyway, the patch from comment #2 moves the Java tmpdir into this location, so that regardless of the size of /tmp the build can succeed. It works for your setup, too.

Anyway, thanks for doing the hard lifting and fixing the port.

-- Martin
